title: CS and SFI payments 2022 to 2024
body: "Countryside Stewardship and Sustainable Farming Incentive payments that have been made to agreement-holders by the Rural Payments Agency in the years 2022, 2023 and 2024. Payments are aggregated to option/action level, which means the total amount that has been paid out for each option/action in the calendar year is presented in each table. "
